label: device-verification
source: az vm run-command invoke on soc-sensor-01 (resource-level state, MDE-independent), subscription redacted
method: RunPowerShellScript: Edge client registry pv, WindowsUpdate RebootRequired key, Microsoft.Update.Session searcher (IsInstalled=0), Win32_OperatingSystem.Caption, scoped libcrypto/libssl scan

updateWindows.note: The single VM is Windows 11 Pro, fully patched. The Windows Server 2022 wording in the recommendation tracks the duplicate Server classification of this one host, not a second machine.

vulnerableOpenSsl.note: Part of the OS image (Windows OpenSSH), not a separately installed app. Its fix path is the Windows servicing channel, not an app uninstall, so it is tracked as system-owned rather than a device-level app update.

defenderForCloudFixesStillInPlace.securityContact: alertNotifications On (High), notificationsByRole On (Owner), email set
defenderForCloudFixesStillInPlace.diagnosticLogs: diag-to-sentinel WorkflowRuntime enabled to sc200-ws on both playbooks
